title: Minecraft: Overly Optimized QOL
description: An FPS mod that not only increases your FPS but also adds some QOL features, all of which are client side
body:
This modpack enhances your gameplay with numerous quality-of-life improvements, boosts FPS significantly, and refines the GUI for a smoother experience. Enjoy better animations, optimized performance, and cleaner visuals without unnecessary clutter. Almost fully client-side(_world gen mods are server side_), this modpack works seamlessly on servers.
